name: design-coworkers
description: Code Mode bridge for 10 design MCP connectors — Canva, Figma, Miro, tldraw, Mermaid Chart, Whimsical, Descript, Splice, SketchUp, and Adobe. Create presentations, diagrams, wireframes, 3D models, canvases, and design critiques. Chains multiple design tools in one execute() call using Code Mode.
